name: Crunchy Chocolate-Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat margarine, sugar, egg yolk, and vanilla until smooth using an electric mixer.
2. Add flour and oats; stir until well combined.
3. Press mixture into the bottom of a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
4. Bake in a preheated 375-degree oven for 15 minutes or until golden brown, then cool slightly.
5. Melt chocolate and margarine over hot (not boiling) water.
6. Spread melted mixture over the warm cookie crust.
7. Sprinkle chopped nuts evenly on top.
8. Let cool completely before cutting into bars with a sharp knife.
Yield: about 2 dozen bars.
